creator: theraven@FreeBSD.org
text: I did write a __cxa_thread_atexit a while ago, but I haven't yet committed it (I'll try to find it).  I didn't commit it because the semantics of _Thread_local are very poorly defined in the presence of shared libraries.  I could think of three wrong ways of implementing it (one of which was chosen by libsupc++), but no right way.
